name: maestro-marketplace
description: Provider-agnostic docs, knowledge graphs, spec workflow, and Conductor integration for Claude Code. Run /maestro:setup to onboard a project.

plugins.name: maestro
plugins.description: Start here. The marketplace's front door: /maestro:setup interviews you in plain terms (where docs live, Conductor, knowledge graph, spec workflow), then installs and configures the right plugins in the right order — no need to know docs-hub, docs-obsidian, spec, conductor-kit, or graphify-kit by name

plugins.name: docs-hub
plugins.description: Provider-agnostic project docs: a per-repo Docs Root at .docs/vault (self-ignoring, always a symlink to a durable Backing Store) that consumer plugins read AND write with plain file tools; a unified `## docs configuration` block ({project, provider, store}) in CLAUDE.local.md; the filesystem provider (~/.docs/<project>) built in; and a single front-door setup that migrates legacy `## spec configuration` blocks and delegates driver work to provider plugins like docs-obsidian

plugins.name: docs-obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian driver for the docs-hub provider contract: vault bootstrap, Backing Store linking into .docs/vault, and an optional MCP add-on with Local REST API port detection

plugins.name: conductor-kit
plugins.description: Conductor integration — GUI/terminal-parity action skills, personal-layer prompt overrides, workspace setup script with docs/graph seeding

plugins.name: graphify-kit
plugins.description: Battle-tested graphify (knowledge graph) onboarding for any repo: exclusion analysis, agent navigation protocol, Explore override, session sync hooks, worktree seeding, and a graph-health doctor

plugins.name: spec
plugins.description: Provider-agnostic spec workflow (storage via docs-hub): spec:plan is the single front door (brainstorm + grill + spec, with an optional lean plan doc and an execution-mode decision); spec:execute runs handed-off plans through pinned subagents. Self-contained (no superpowers dependency); reads/writes project docs with plain file tools on the .docs/vault Docs Root.
